Audit: recs-isolation-vantage-test
Status: WARN
Runner: 172.17.144.1, 192.168.0.112, 169.254.181.131, 192.168.174.1, 192.168.83.1, 192.168.20.105 (not in any spec network)

       ΓÇó gateway 10.0.20.1 is not reachable

       ΓÇó gateway 10.0.30.1 is not reachable

--- Recommendations ---
[1] Isolation result has limited confidence (isolation)
   The isolation check for iot -> clients produced a weak signal.
   REMEDIATION: Run this check using a probe located inside the source zone (the 'from' network) for a definitive result. Add or use a probe in that VLAN and set runner: <probe-name> on the assertion.
   AFFECTED: iot -> clients

[2] Isolation result has limited confidence (isolation)
   The isolation check for clients -> iot produced a weak signal.
   REMEDIATION: Run this check using a probe located inside the source zone (the 'from' network) for a definitive result. Add or use a probe in that VLAN and set runner: <probe-name> on the assertion.
